title: Dev Home
content_html:
Dev Home

Technical documentation is organised by functional domain rather than file type. If it is a repo-wide concern, it goes here. Otherwise, it is found under the following domains:

Key Documents

Studio
Studio routes, page wiring, and Studio-specific behavior.

  • UI site-wide UI framework and maintenance
  • Change Requests proposed and in-progress request docs, including UI request specs and task breakdowns.
  • Architecture route/runtime building blocks, shared shell behavior, and generated-artifact flow into the live site.
  • Config checked-in config files and loader modules, what reads them, and when.
  • Data Models the main reference for generated/runtime data contracts and source-data records.
  • Scripts repo scripts, their flags, outputs, and operational responsibilities.
  • Docs Viewer the shared docs module used by /docs/ and /library/.
  • Search dedicated catalogue search plus inline docs-domain search.
summary: This section contains technical reference documents that apply to the repo as a whole.
